title: ビジネス会議での発言
description: 会議での意見交換や提案を行うための表現

example_phrases.en: I'd like to share my thoughts on this matter.
example_phrases.ja: この件について私の考えを共有したいと思います。

example_phrases.en: Based on our data, I believe we should focus on...
example_phrases.ja: データに基づくと、私たちは...に集中すべきだと考えます。

example_phrases.en: Could you elaborate on that point?
example_phrases.ja: その点についてもう少し詳しく説明していただけますか？

example_phrases.en: I see your point, but I have a different perspective.
example_phrases.ja: あなたの意見は理解できますが、私は異なる視点を持っています。

key_vocabulary.example: I have a proposal for the new project.
From my perspective, this approach has several advantages.
Let's move to the next item on our agenda.
We need to reach a consensus on this issue.

grammar_points.explanation: 自分の意見を丁寧に述べる表現
grammar_points.example: I believe that this strategy will yield better results.
Could you provide more details about the timeline?

grammar_points.explanation: 相手の意見を認めつつ異なる見解を示す表現
grammar_points.example: I see your point, but we need to consider the costs as well.
